content: Hi, I'm Spencer. I'm a veterinarian at a rural practice, and I'm currently recovering from a knee injury.
Hi Spencer, sorry to hear about your injury. How are you doing? Is the recovery process going well?

It's going okay, I'm just taking it one day at a time. I've had to adjust my routine a bit, but I'm managing. I've even started knitting again, it's been a great way to relax and take my mind off things.
That's great to hear. Knitting is a wonderful hobby. Have you made anything recently?

Actually, yes. I've made a few scarves and hats, they make great gifts for my colleagues. I've also been listening to a lot of podcasts, they're really helpful for passing the time while I'm recovering.
Podcasts are a great way to learn new things or just relax. What kind of podcasts do you enjoy listening to?
I love listening to true crime podcasts, they're so interesting. And, I've also been getting into board game podcasts, I've discovered some new games that I want to try.
That sounds like a lot of fun. Do you have a favorite board game or one that you're really excited to try?
Yeah, I love playing Scrabble, it's one of my favorites. I've also been thinking about hosting a game night at my practice, we could play some games and have some fun.
That sounds like a great idea. Game nights are a wonderful way to build camaraderie with your colleagues. Have you thought about what games you'll play or what kind of food you'll serve?
I've thought about it a bit, but I'd love some suggestions. Maybe we could play some team-building games or have a puzzle competition.
Those are great ideas. I can definitely provide some suggestions. What's your favorite type of food, maybe we can plan some snacks or meals around that?
I love Italian food, pasta is my favorite. And, I've been thinking about taking a cooking class, maybe I can learn some new recipes.
That sounds like a lot of fun. Cooking classes are a great way to learn new skills and meet new people. Have you thought about what kind of cooking class you'd like to take?

Yeah, I've been thinking about taking a class on Italian cuisine, maybe I can learn how to make some new dishes. I've also been thinking about volunteering at a local animal shelter, they have a veterinary clinic on site.
That's a great idea. Volunteering is a wonderful way to give back to the community. We can discuss more about your volunteering opportunities and game night plans if you'd like.
That would be great, thanks for the offer. I think that's all for now, I've got a lot to think about and plan out.
You're welcome, it was great chatting with you. Feel free to reach out if you need any more advice or just want to talk about your progress.
